accepted.decision: No fixed version is published for github.com/pion/dtls/v2. Orbitalis does not configure DTLS directly; exposure is transitive through networking dependencies. Monitor upstream and retest with symbol-level govulncheck before testnet release.

No fixed Cosmos SDK version is published for the slashing-evasion advisory affecting github.com/cosmos/cosmos-sdk. Orbitalis keeps x/slashing enabled and must track upstream remediation before public validator onboarding.

The advisory affects x/crisis behavior. Orbitalis does not expose custom crisis flows in v1, but the dependency is retained through Cosmos SDK. Keep documented until upstream publishes a remediation path.
The advisory affects x/crisis ConstantFee accounting. Orbitalis does not rely on x/crisis fees for protocol security in v1. Keep documented until upstream publishes a remediation path.
The advisory is fixed in CometBFT v1.0.1, but Orbitalis is pinned to the Cosmos SDK v0.54.x CometBFT v0.39 family. Track CometBFT/Cosmos compatibility before upgrading consensus dependencies.
